nodes.text: Welcome, welcome! First customer of the day! Well... first customer this week.
Not much in stock right now, but if you find any Gold Teeth, I'll trade you fair and square.
A Gold Tooth! Shiny! I'll trade you for something useful.
Pleasure doing business! Come back when you find more teeth.
The hero returns! Anything in my shop is yours, free of charge. You've earned it.
